title: Peppery Croatian Fines-Herbes Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful pilaf dish from Croatia, featuring peppery fines-herbes and a satisfying crunch. Perfect for a lazy Sunday brunch.

ingredients.name: fines herbes
ingredients.notes: chopped fresh parsley, dill, chives, and tarragon

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality oil for best flavor

ingredients.name: water
ingredients.notes: use a vegetable or chicken broth for added depth

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped fines herbes and cook for another minute, until softened.
Add the rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly toasted.
